name: Italian Zucchini Crescent Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a skillet, cook zucchini and onion in butter until tender, about 8 minutes.
3. Stir in parsley and seasonings.
4. In a large bowl, blend eggs and cheese. Stir in the vegetable mixture.
5. Separate dough into 8 triangles (see note). Place in an ungreased 10-inch pie plate, 12 x 8 baking dish, or 11 inch quiche pan. Press over the bottom and up the sides to form a crust. Seal perforations.
6. Spread crust with mustard. Pour vegetable mixture evenly into the prepared crust.
7. Bake at 375°F for 18 to 22 minutes, or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean. Let stand 10 minutes before serving.
NOTE: If using a 12 x 8 pan, separate dough into 2 rectangles. Press over the bottom and 1 inch up the sides to form a crust.
8. To reheat, cover loosely with foil and heat at 375°F for 12-15 minutes.
Serving Size: 6
